items.briefing:
Adelaide University students have been caught up in a global data breach, raising concerns for those affected. Separately, Canvas learning platform provider Instructure has reportedly reached an agreement with hackers following a cyber incident — relevant given how widely Canvas is used across Australian education and training providers, including registered training organisations.

Australian businesses are also being urged to strengthen ransomware defences, with experts warning current protections may be inadequate. A Google report confirms AI is now routinely used in cyberattacks, making threats faster and harder to detect.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Canvas, check for any official communications from Instructure about the incident and ensure staff change their passwords as a precaution.
